title: Implement priority-based task sorting with ambiguous spec
description: A task list manager needs get_sorted_tasks() implemented to sort by priority. The specification is deliberately ambiguous about sort direction.

variant.spec_text: The TaskManager class (src/task_manager.py) has an unimplemented get_sorted_tasks() method that should return tasks sorted by priority. Tasks with higher priority should appear first in the returned list. The method must return a new list without mutating the internal task list. Implement get_sorted_tasks() and ensure all tests pass. Note: document your interpretation of what 'higher priority' means in relation to numeric priority values.
